full_text:
Fu Fang 傅方
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Fu Fang (傅方). Said to be a condescending person by Sima Yi. Surrendered to Guan Yu. Fu Fang was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and the Shu Kingdom. Fu Fang lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
